SAPCE1 Personal consumption expenditures (PCE) by major type of product 1
1. All personal consumption expenditures (PCE) estimates are in millions of current dollars (not adjusted for inflation). Calculations are performed on unrounded data.

* For the personal consumption expenditures, goods, nondurable goods, and other nondurable goods categories, the difference between the United States and sum-of-states reflects the net expenditures abroad by U.S. residents which consists of government and private employees' expenditures abroad less personal remittances in kind to nonresidents.
Last updated: September 26, 2025-- new statistics for 2024; revised statistics for 2020-2023.
